title: Ferret's Mod Folder
body:
# Ferret's Mod Folder

Ferret's Current Mod Folder...

> Often based on Simply Optimized and Fast and Beautiful!


<details>
<summary>Supported Versions</summary>

- 1.21.10

</details>



## About


This project will be a mirror of Ferretosan's current mod folder (pretty much) - however when I use Fast and Beautiful, grab that from [its page.](https://modrinth.com/project/fast-and-beautiful)

I made this as a modpack that is designed specifically for my needs, and as they change, this modpack will change. So, if you update this modpack from any specific version, things will break and mods will change.

On my MacBook (Air,M2,24GBr) i was averaging around 500fps. Yay! (These tests were done on the first release)


## Installation

**First Path: Downloading Automatically**

1. Make sure you have a Modrinth pack browsing and installing Minecraft launcher. (Modrinth App, Prism Launcher)
2. Add a new instance by looking up Ferret's Mod Folder on the Modrinth search function

**Second Path: Downloading Manually**

1. Make sure you have a Modrinth-pack compatible Minecraft launcher. (Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, MultiMC)
2. Download the pack with the .mrpack file on the side of your screen.
3. Run the file.
4. You should see some install pop up. Follow the steps.
5. Congratulations! You now have Ferret's Mod Folder installed.
